feedback.text: It's about time these abusive practices and policies were reined in. The lack of privacy protection, intrusive advertising, manipulative user experience design, and the overall difficulty in saying "no" to any online service or subscription have become some of my greatest concern. If there's thing I'd like to add, it's that there are no protections against products being remotely disabled permanently, leaving the consumers with empty hands but the manufacturer gets to keep their money. Smart appliances, digital-only movies and "live service" games and other software will eventually be shut off, unless consumers are allowed to self-manage products that they bought and paid for.
